skills.name: create-github-pr
skills.description: Create a GitHub pull request with auto-generated branch name, commit, and push

prTitle.description: The title of the pull request (used to generate branch name)

prDescription.description: Detailed description of the pull request changes

baseBranch.description: Base branch to create PR against

labels.description: GitHub labels to add to the PR (e.g., 'bug', 'feature', 'enhancement')
